product_overview: A web application that lets students submit and track clearance requests across university departments while enabling admins and department staff to manage users, departments, and clearance decisions. The app provides role-based dashboards for students, department staff, and administrators to complete the end-to-end clearance workflow.
core_goals: Allow students to submit clearance requests, upload required documents, and track department-by-department clearance progress.
Enable department staff to review requests, add remarks, and approve or reject departmental clearance items.
Provide administrators with tools to manage users, configure departments and clearance requirements, and monitor system-wide clearance metrics.
Let all users manage their account and change passwords securely.

features.name: Login Screen
features.description: Multi-role authentication entry point that lets students and staff sign in and reach their respective dashboards.
user_flows: Open the application -> Navigate to the login screen -> Select Student role -> Enter registration number or university email -> Enter password -> Submit credentials -> See student dashboard

Open the application -> Navigate to the login screen -> Select Staff/Admin role -> Enter staff email -> Enter password -> Submit credentials -> See admin dashboard or department dashboard depending on role
Open the application -> Navigate to the login screen -> Enter credentials with incorrect password -> Submit credentials -> See validation error indicating invalid credentials

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Student-facing area to view overall clearance progress, submit new clearance requests, view department statuses, and update personal profile information.
user_flows: Login as a student -> Open the student dashboard -> See clearance progress summary and overall percentage -> View list of departments with individual status indicators

Login as a student -> Open the student dashboard -> Start a new clearance request -> Provide request details and attach required documents -> Submit the clearance request -> See confirmation that the request was submitted and status updated

Login as a student -> Open the student dashboard -> Start a new clearance request -> Leave a required field or document missing -> Attempt to submit -> See validation error identifying the missing required field or document
Login as a student -> Open profile settings from the dashboard -> Update contact or personal information -> Save changes -> See confirmation and updated profile details reflected in the dashboard

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Administrator interface to view system-wide metrics, manage users and students, and configure departments and clearance rules.
user_flows: Login as an admin -> Open the admin dashboard -> See system metrics, recent clearance activity, and key performance indicators
Login as an admin -> Open user management -> Search or filter users -> Select a user to edit role or department assignment -> Save changes -> See updated user record reflected in the list
Login as an admin -> Open department management -> Create a new department by providing name, code, type, and clearance configuration -> Save the new department -> See the new department listed
Login as an admin -> Open department management -> Attempt to create a department using a code that already exists -> Submit -> See validation error indicating duplicate department code

features.name: Department Dashboard
features.description: Department staff portal to review incoming student clearance requests, inspect attachments and comments, and record approval or rejection decisions with remarks.
user_flows: Login as department staff -> Open the department dashboard -> See list of pending clearance requests assigned to the department -> Open a specific student's request -> Review submitted documents and timeline entries -> Approve the department clearance and optionally add remarks -> See the request status updated for the department

Login as department staff -> Open the department dashboard -> Open a student's request -> Reject the request -> Provide rejection remarks explaining missing items -> Submit the decision -> See the request status updated to rejected for the department and the remarks recorded

features.name: Password Management
features.description: Interface for users to securely change their account password by providing the current password and confirming a new one.
user_flows: Login as any user -> Navigate to the change password screen -> Enter current password -> Enter new password -> Confirm new password -> Submit password change -> See confirmation that the password was updated

Login as any user -> Navigate to the change password screen -> Enter incorrect current password -> Enter new password and confirmation -> Submit password change -> See validation error indicating the current password is incorrect

features.name: Login Screen
features.description: Multi-role login screen supporting students and staff.

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: View clearance status, request clearance, and manage profile.

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Manage users, departments, and system-wide clearance processes.

features.name: Department Dashboard
features.description: Approve or reject clearance requests for a specific department.
